# Let's open the provided file and inspect its content, length, and display it with indices for sanity.
path = "/mnt/data/file-MexnSbU6gQLi2Ek8CfQCK3-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

import re, json

path = "/mnt/data/file-MexnSbU6gQLi2Ek8CfQCK3-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()

# Find ayah between markers
start_marker = "(aya_start)"
end_marker = "(aya_end)"
start = text.find(start_marker)
end = text.find(end_marker)
(full_start, full_end) = (None, None)
if start != -1 and end != -1:
    ayah_matn = text[start+len(start_marker):end]
    # Trim whitespace just in case
    ayah_matn_trim = ayah_matn.strip()
    # Now compute global indices of the trimmed span
    # The trimmed span starts at first occurrence of trimmed inside ayah_matn from left
    inner_offset = ayah_matn.find(ayah_matn_trim)
    full_start = start + len(start_marker) + inner_offset
    full_end = full_start + len(ayah_matn_trim)
    print("Ayah main:", ayah_matn_trim, (full_start, full_end))

# Find occurrence of "فَأَنْجاهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ النَّارِ" after [1] header
pattern_phrase = "فَأَنْجاهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ النَّارِ"
# find index where [1] starts
idx1 = text.find("[1]")
idx_phrase_all = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(re.escape(pattern_phrase), text)]
print("All occurrences of phrase:", idx_phrase_all)
# pick the occurrence after idx1
occ_after_idx1 = [i for i in idx_phrase_all if i > idx1]
if occ_after_idx1:
    phrase1_start = occ_after_idx1[0]
    phrase1_end = phrase1_start + len(pattern_phrase)
    print("Phrase after [1] indices:", (phrase1_start, phrase1_end), text[phrase1_start:phrase1_end])

# Find "إِنَّ فِي ذلِكَ لَآياتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ" after [1]
pattern2 = "إِنَّ فِي ذلِكَ لَآياتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ"
occ2_all = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(re.escape(pattern2), text)]
print("All occurrences pattern2:", occ2_all)
occ2_after1 = [i for i in occ2_all if i > idx1]
if occ2_after1:
    start2 = occ2_after1[0]
    end2 = start2 + len(pattern2)
    print("pattern2 after [1] indices:", (start2, end2), text[start2:end2])

# Find the [2] parentheses content "فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ . . . فِي الآخرة لَمِنَ الصالحين"
target3 = "فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ . . . فِي الآخرة لَمِنَ الصالحين"
start3 = text.find(target3)
print("Start3:", start3, "Slice:", text[start3:start3+len(target3)])
# find the "فقوله - تعالى - : ( فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ .  [...]" phrase to extract "فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ"
inner_phrase = "فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ"
# find the second occurrence near that line
occ_inner_all = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(re.escape(inner_phrase), text)]
print("All occurrences of inner phrase:", occ_inner_all)
# The first occurrence is in the big ayah string; second is in the parentheses of [2], and possibly third is in the parentheses repeated
for i in occ_inner_all:
    print(i, repr(text[i-30:i+len(inner_phrase)+40]))

# Identify the one that is inside the segment "( فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ .  [...]"
context = "( فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ .  [...]"
ctx_start = text.find(context)
ctx_start, context, text[ctx_start:ctx_start+len(context)+5]

inner_phrase = "فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ"
start_inner2 = 1139
end_inner2 = start_inner2 + len(inner_phrase)
print(start_inner2, end_inner2, text[start_inner2:end_inner2])

target3 = "فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ . . . فِي الآخرة لَمِنَ الصالحين"
start3 = text.find(target3)
end3 = start3 + len(target3)
start3, end3, text[start3:end3]

spans = []
# 1. Big verse
spans.append({
    "span_start": 122,
    "span_end": 271,
    "span_text": text[122:271],
    "citation_type": "Aya"
})
# 2. Phrase after [1]
spans.append({
    "span_start": 528,
    "span_end": 560,
    "span_text": text[528:560],
    "citation_type": "Aya"
})
# 3. Pattern2 after [1]
spans.append({
    "span_start": 682,
    "span_end": 726,
    "span_text": text[682:726],
    "citation_type": "Aya"
})
# 4. Quote in [2]
spans.append({
    "span_start": 1054,
    "span_end": 1115,
    "span_text": text[1054:1115],
    "citation_type": "Aya"
})
# 5. Second parentheses short phrase
spans.append({
    "span_start": 1139,
    "span_end": 1167,
    "span_text": text[1139:1167],
    "citation_type": "Aya"
})
# Validate against original text positions
for s in spans:
    s["ok"] = (text[s["span_start"]:s["span_end"]] == s["span_text"])
spans

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":122,"span_end":271,"span_text":"فَما كانَ جَوابَ قَوْمِهِ إِلَّا أَنْ قالُوا اقْتُلُوهُ أَوْ حَرِّقُوهُ فَأَنْجاهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ النَّارِ إِنَّ فِي ذلِكَ لَآياتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":528,"span_end":560,"span_text":"فَأَنْجاهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ النَّارِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":682,"span_end":726,"span_text":"إِنَّ فِي ذلِكَ لَآياتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1054,"span_end":1115,"span_text":"فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ . . . فِي الآخرة لَمِنَ الصالحين","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1139,"span_end":1167,"span_text":"فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ","citation_type":"Aya"}]}
